subcodes.first_line: O ye two luminous lamps within the glass of the love of God! That which was written hath been noted and understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو سراج روشن در زجاجه محبت الله آنچه مرقوم شده بود مشهود و معلوم گردید و
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
